_description: Volatile configuration for install-node — LTS policy, version-manager preference, per-platform installer commands, bootstrap URLs. Read at invocation by SKILL.md Step 0. SKILL.md prose must not duplicate values from this file.

lts._note: When the live fetch fails, use fallbackMajor. supportedMajors lists the active LTS plus prior LTS that are still acceptable.

nvm.installCommand: nvm install --lts && nvm alias default lts/*

bootstrap.verifyGuidance: Inspect the downloaded script before running. Compute sha256sum locally and compare against the upstream-published checksum.

choco.reason: Introduces a new package manager as a side effect of installing Node. Acceptable only when Chocolatey is already in use.

pkgInstaller.reason: The .pkg installer from nodejs.org writes to system paths and is harder to uninstall cleanly.

linux._note: When no Node and no manager are present, bootstrap nvm via versionManagers.nvm.bootstrap, then run versionManagers.nvm.installCommand.

distroPackage.reason: The distro package version on most distros is well behind LTS.
